name: Kimmy Mobile Legends
description:
Futuristic, space, and intergalactic adventure themed. Kimmy appears as a genius space pilot with a high-tech cat-like armor (because of his helmet's cat-ear shape).

Exploring the galaxy, one chemical blast at a time!"

In an alternate future, Kimmy is a mechanic and space scientist who belongs to the Galactic Federation. Bored with ordinary laboratory experiments, Kimmy decides to explore the galaxy using his own advanced armor called ASTROCAT - an exosuit equipped with cutting-edge plasma chemical weapons and Al-based navigation systems.

With a clever and eccentric fighting style, she explores strange and dangerous planets while shooting chemical sprays from his weapons. She's not just a researcher - she's also a galactic bounty hunter and a rescuer of space colonies threatened by mutants and wild aliens.

Although she looks cute and cheerful, Kimmy is not playing around. Anyone who underestimates her "weird" fighting style usually has a knockout before he has a chance to laugh.
